CREATE TABLE test_samples (baseline FLOAT, mde FLOAT, power FLOAT, alpha FLOAT);
SELECT minSampleSizeConversion(baseline, mde, power, alpha) AS sample_size FROM test_samples WHERE baseline = 0.25 AND mde = 0.03;
SELECT minSampleSizeConversion(baseline, mde, power, alpha) AS sample_size, baseline - mde AS lower_bound, baseline + mde AS upper_bound FROM test_samples WHERE power >= 0.80;
SELECT avg(sample_size) FROM (SELECT minSampleSizeConversion(baseline, mde, power, alpha) AS sample_size FROM test_samples);
SELECT baseline, minSampleSizeConversion(baseline, mde, power, alpha) AS sample_size FROM test_samples WHERE alpha IN (0.01, 0.05);
CREATE TABLE complex_tests AS SELECT baseline, mde, power, alpha, minSampleSizeConversion(baseline, mde, power, alpha) AS sample_size FROM test_samples;

WITH (SELECT min(mde) FROM test_samples) AS min_mde, (SELECT max(mde) FROM test_samples) AS max_mde SELECT baseline, minSampleSizeConversion(baseline, min_mde, power, alpha) AS sample_size_lower, minSampleSizeConversion(baseline, max_mde, power, alpha) AS sample_size_upper FROM test_samples;
SELECT baseline, minSampleSizeConversion(baseline, mde, power, alpha) AS sample_size FROM test_samples WHERE alpha BETWEEN 0.01 AND 0.05 AND power IN (0.80, 0.90);
